dialogue.speaker: Anna
dialogue.text: Hello! Are you the new neighbor?

dialogue.speaker: Tom
dialogue.text: Yes, I am. My name is Tom.

dialogue.speaker: Anna
dialogue.text: Nice to meet you, Tom. I'm Anna.

dialogue.speaker: Tom
dialogue.text: Nice to meet you too. Do you live here with your family?
dialogue.translation: Hauska tavata sinutkin. Asutko täällä perheesi kanssa?

dialogue.speaker: Anna
dialogue.text: Yes, I live with my husband and my daughter.
dialogue.translation: Kyllä, asun mieheni ja tyttäreni kanssa.

dialogue.speaker: Tom
dialogue.text: That's great. I work at the hospital. What about you?
dialogue.translation: Sepä hienoa. Työskentelen sairaalassa. Entä sinä?

dialogue.speaker: Anna
dialogue.text: I study English at the university.

dialogue.speaker: Tom
dialogue.text: Wonderful! Well, I have to go now. See you later!
dialogue.translation: Ihanaa! No, minun täytyy mennä nyt. Nähdään myöhemmin!

dialogue.speaker: Anna
dialogue.text: Goodbye, Tom.

dialogue.speaker: Waiter
dialogue.text: Good morning. What do you want to eat?

dialogue.speaker: Client
dialogue.text: I'd like a sandwich, please.

dialogue.speaker: Waiter
dialogue.text: Do you want cheese or ham?

dialogue.speaker: Client
dialogue.text: Ham, please. And I want a glass of orange juice.
dialogue.translation: Kinkkua, kiitos. Ja haluan lasillisen appelsiinimehua.

dialogue.speaker: Waiter
dialogue.text: Anything else? Coffee or tea?

dialogue.speaker: Client
dialogue.text: Yes, I'd like a cup of coffee with milk.

dialogue.speaker: Waiter
dialogue.text: That's a sandwich, orange juice and coffee. Is that correct?
dialogue.translation: Eli voileipä, appelsiinimehu ja kahvi. Onko se oikein?

dialogue.speaker: Client
dialogue.text: Yes, perfect. How much is it?

dialogue.speaker: Waiter
dialogue.text: It's 9 dollars. You can pay at the counter.
dialogue.translation: Se on 9 dollaria. Voit maksaa kassalla.

dialogue.speaker: Mom
dialogue.text: It's raining outside. What do you want to do today?
dialogue.translation: Ulkona sataa. Mitä haluat tehdä tänään?

dialogue.speaker: Daughter
dialogue.text: I want to watch a movie in the living room.

dialogue.speaker: Mom
dialogue.text: Good idea. And I want to read my new book.
dialogue.translation: Hyvä idea. Ja haluan lukea uuden kirjani.

dialogue.speaker: Daughter
dialogue.text: Can I have some hot chocolate?

dialogue.speaker: Mom
dialogue.text: Yes, I can prepare it for you.

dialogue.speaker: Daughter
dialogue.text: And later, can I play with my toys?

dialogue.speaker: Mom
dialogue.text: Sure. But first, let's clean the bedroom together.
dialogue.translation: Tietenkin. Mutta ensin, siivotaan makuuhuone yhdessä.

dialogue.speaker: Daughter
dialogue.text: OK, Mom. After that, maybe I take a nap.
dialogue.translation: Okei, äiti. Sen jälkeen otan ehkä päiväunet.

title: Buying a T-shirt at the store

dialogue.speaker: Salesperson
dialogue.text: Hello. Can I help you?

dialogue.speaker: Customer
dialogue.text: Yes, I want to buy a T-shirt.

dialogue.speaker: Salesperson
dialogue.text: What color do you like?

dialogue.speaker: Customer
dialogue.text: I like blue and black. Do you have a blue one?
dialogue.translation: Pidän sinisestä ja mustasta. Onko teillä sinistä?

dialogue.speaker: Salesperson
dialogue.text: Yes, we do. What size do you need?

dialogue.speaker: Customer
dialogue.text: I think I need a large size. Can I try it on?
dialogue.translation: Luulen tarvitsevani ison koon. Voinko kokeilla sitä?

dialogue.speaker: Salesperson
dialogue.text: Of course. The fitting room is over there.

dialogue.speaker: Customer
dialogue.text: It fits perfectly! I like it very much. How much does it cost?
dialogue.translation: Se sopii täydellisesti! Pidän siitä todella paljon. Paljonko se maksaa?

dialogue.speaker: Salesperson
dialogue.text: It costs 25 dollars. Do you want to take it?
dialogue.translation: Se maksaa 25 dollaria. Haluatko ottaa sen?

dialogue.speaker: Customer
dialogue.text: Yes, I'll take it.

title: Asking for directions to the bank

dialogue.speaker: Tourist
dialogue.text: Excuse me. I need to go to the bank. Where is it?
dialogue.translation: Anteeksi. Minun täytyy mennä pankkiin. Missä se on?

dialogue.speaker: Local
dialogue.text: The bank is near the park. Go straight down this street.
dialogue.translation: Pankki on lähellä puistoa. Mene suoraan tätä katua.

dialogue.speaker: Tourist
dialogue.text: OK, go straight. Then?

dialogue.speaker: Local
dialogue.text: Walk for two blocks and turn right at the cinema.
dialogue.translation: Kävele kaksi korttelia ja käänny oikealle elokuvateatterin kohdalla.

dialogue.speaker: Tourist
dialogue.text: Turn right at the cinema. Is it far?
dialogue.translation: Kääntyä oikealle elokuvateatterin kohdalla. Onko se kaukana?

dialogue.speaker: Local
dialogue.text: No, it's not far. Cross the street and you'll see the bank in front of you.
dialogue.translation: Ei, se ei ole kaukana. Ylitä katu ja näet pankin edessäsi.

dialogue.speaker: Tourist
dialogue.text: Great. And is there a bus stop near there?
dialogue.translation: Mahtavaa. Ja onko siellä lähellä bussipysäkkiä?

dialogue.speaker: Local
dialogue.text: Yes, there is a bus stop next to the bank. You can take bus number 5.
dialogue.translation: Kyllä, pankin vieressä on bussipysäkki. Voit ottaa bussin numero 5.

dialogue.speaker: Tourist
dialogue.text: Thank you very much for your help.

dialogue.speaker: Local
dialogue.text: You're welcome.

dialogue.speaker: Lucy
dialogue.text: Look! This is a photo of my family.

dialogue.speaker: Peter
dialogue.text: Wow! Who is the man next to you?

dialogue.speaker: Lucy
dialogue.text: That is my father. He is tall and has brown hair.
dialogue.translation: Se on isäni. Hän on pitkä ja hänellä on ruskeat hiukset.

dialogue.speaker: Peter
dialogue.text: And the woman with the glasses?

dialogue.speaker: Lucy
dialogue.text: That's my mother. She is a teacher. She is wearing a blue dress.
dialogue.translation: Se on äitini. Hän on opettaja. Hänellä on yllään sininen mekko.

dialogue.speaker: Peter
dialogue.text: They look very happy. Is that your brother?
dialogue.translation: He näyttävät erittäin onnellisilta. Onko se veljesi?

dialogue.speaker: Lucy
dialogue.text: Yes, he is my brother. He is sitting on the sofa. He is 10 years old.
dialogue.translation: Kyllä, hän on veljeni. Hän istuu sohvalla. Hän on 10-vuotias.

dialogue.speaker: Peter
dialogue.text: And where are you in the photo?

dialogue.speaker: Lucy
dialogue.text: I am standing behind my parents. I smile a lot!

dialogue.speaker: Peter
dialogue.text: You have a nice family. Do you all live together?
dialogue.translation: Sinulla on mukava perhe. Asutteko kaikki yhdessä?

dialogue.speaker: Lucy
dialogue.text: Yes, we live in a big house near the beach. I love them.
dialogue.translation: Kyllä, asumme isossa talossa lähellä rantaa. Rakastan heitä.
